---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages from the browser console or server logs.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Bun version: [output of `bun --version`]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- Deployment method: [Docker Compose / Manual]
- Pirate Radio server version (if known):

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem. Include relevant server logs if available.
